entity.summary: Decentralized spot and perpetual trading exchange with on-chain multi-asset pools, residual liquidity, and substantial historical spot and perpetual trading activity.
entity.notes: DefiLlama reports residual current TVL and substantial cumulative spot and perpetual volume across BNB Chain and Arbitrum, but a stable first-party website surface and clear current public trading access were not recovered in this review pass. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active status.

evidence.title: El Dorado Exchange official social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used as identity corroboration.

evidence.title: El Dorado Exchange metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies El Dorado Exchange as an on-chain spot and perpetual exchange and reports residual TVL plus cumulative spot and perpetual trading volume across BNB Chain and Arbitrum.

evidence.title: El Dorado Exchange DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies El Dorado Exchange as a decentralized trading venue.
